name: Task Chair Black - Room Essentials™
description: Be comfortable and relaxed while working with the Task Chair from Room Essentials™. Covered in durable, easy-care fabric, this work chair has a cushy padded seat and back to keep you in comfort all day. Designed with height adjustment to fit your needs with the assembled chair height:  29 inches, adjusting to the max height of  33.25 inches.  The hooded casters allow for easy movement, this armless chair offers a full range motion everywhere you need it. You can use this sleek chair at home or in the office to keep you feeling your best as you work.
